summary: Planned conservative PR-inventory classifications only. No GitHub mutations are allowed in plan mode; low-signal closeout, fix PRs, and merges are disabled by job frontmatter. Open security-sensitive PR #18778 is routed to central security handling; unrelated open PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review/proof; already-closed PRs are kept closed.
